title: Diploma Jobs 2026 – Senior Assistant Engineer
shortInfo: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Senior Assistant Engineer (E-1 grade) (Drone Veteran). Candidates with Diploma Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 22-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through BEL official website.

basic_details.job_title: BEL Senior Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Senior Assistant Engineer (E-1 grade) (Drone Veteran). Candidates with Diploma Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 22-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through BEL official website.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the BEL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: 3 years Diploma in Engineering or equivalent in Mechanical / Electrical / Electronics / Aeronautical / Mechatronics
qualification.details: 3 years Diploma in Engineering or equivalent in Mechanical / Electrical / Electronics / Aeronautical / Mechatronics

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://bel-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the BEL Senior Assistant Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BEL Senior Assistant Engineer (E-1 grade) (Drone Veteran) posts is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 3 years Diploma in Engineering or an equivalent qualification in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, Aeronautical, or Mechatronics disciplines to be eligible for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Senior Assistant Engineer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Assistant Engineer (E-1 grade) (Drone Veteran) post is 50 years as of the application deadline.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 1,20,000 per month, with a 3% increment annually.

faq.question: How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this BEL recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Senior Assistant Engineer (E-1 grade) (Drone Veteran) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Senior Assistant Engineer post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Assistant Engineer (E-1 grade) (Drone Veteran) position will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Senior Assistant Engineer (E-1 grade) (Drone Veteran) post is contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of BEL.

faq.question: Where is the BEL office located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for BEL's Bengaluru office, located in Karnataka. The specific address for sending applications will be detailed in the official notification PDF.
